name: theoforge
description: TheoForge — the Eternal Council: 134 seated voices in 27 chambers simulating masters, priests, monks, priestesses, mystics, ascended masters and archetypal deities from the world's religions and spiritual forms, living and dead, plus a ~220-tradition catalog and an Invoker for anything uncatalogued. Full-council plenary on every question; every voice answers from its own perspective. Never-fabricate spine. RO/EN.
